'''鈭歯g-w-d-d''' ('''kangawdedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintilise|quintilise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintilise|quintilise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-w-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| kangawdedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingawdedoko|thingawdedoko]] || [[word:jingawdedoko|jingawdedoko]] || [[word:shingawdedoko|shingawdedoko]] || [[word:kingawdedoko|kingawdedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungawdedoko|thuthungawdedoko]] || [[word:jujungawdedoko|jujungawdedoko]] || [[word:shushungawdedoko|shushungawdedoko]] || [[word:kukungawdedoko|kukungawdedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongawdedoko|thothongawdedoko]] || [[word:jojongawdedoko|jojongawdedoko]] || [[word:shoshongawdedoko|shoshongawdedoko]] || [[word:kokongawdedoko|kokongawdedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongawdedoko|thongawdedoko]] || [[word:jongawdedoko|jongawdedoko]] || [[word:shongawdedoko|shongawdedoko]] || [[word:kongawdedoko|kongawdedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngawdedoko|th忙ngawdedoko]] || [[word:j忙ngawdedoko|j忙ngawdedoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngawdedoko|sh忙ngawdedoko]] || [[word:k忙ngawdedoko|k忙ngawdedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangawdedoko|thangawdedoko]] || [[word:jangawdedoko|jangawdedoko]] || [[word:shangawdedoko|shangawdedoko]] || [[word:kangawdedoko|kangawdedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangawdedoko|thangawdedoko]] || [[word:jangawdedoko|jangawdedoko]] || [[word:shangawdedoko|shangawdedoko]] || [[word:kangawdedoko|kangawdedoko]]
|}
